texto: ...writing surrounds us: it's not something we do just in school or on the job but something that is as familiar and everyday as a pair of worn sneakers or the air we breathe.

frase_original: ...writing surrounds us: it's not something we do just in school or on the job but something that is as familiar and everyday as a pair of worn sneakers or the air we breathe.

texto: Literature might be called the art of story, and story might in turn be called a universal language, for every culture we know of has a tradition of storytelling. No doubt stories have touched your life, too, from bedtime stories you may have heard as a child to news stories you see on TV or read in a newspaper. We might even say that a major goal of living is to created the story of our own lives, a story we hope to take pleasure and pride in telling.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Andrea A. Lunsford sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Literature might be called the art of story, and story might in turn be called a universal langua…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, story, storytelling, útil em momentos de storytelling e writers-on-writing.
